_README: STAGED — NOT ACTIVE. The GitHub Action (.github/workflows/sheet-ops.yml) triggers only on the exact path context/sheet-ops/pending.json, so this file does nothing where it sits. TO RUN: (1) replace sheet_id with the RidgeCo STAGING sheet id, (2) copy this file to context/sheet-ops/pending.json, (3) push. Run against STAGING first; after the smoke tests pass, repeat with the live id 1KggRJBeJg6WDElisEQmAEsmB0hXtoNBIYWbOMFCd4S4.
description: B-104 pass 1: add Work_Orders.Entry_Notes — append-only, attributed access/scheduling notes (admin + auto-appended from Buildium intake). Admin and Vendor only; enrichWO strips it from the tenant and owner payloads. Additive trailing column, so no existing worker.js column index shifts (FEATURE_LOG rules 3 and 6). Vendor_Thread and Hold_Reason are pass 2 and are NOT in this file.
_pass2_note: Pass 2 (rest of B-104) adds Vendor_Thread and Hold_Reason, plus the Notes -> Admin_Notes repurpose. Note that Notes is currently rendered verbatim by BOTH owner.html (line ~659) and tenant.html (line ~391), so making it admin-only is a visible behavior change for those portals and needs a UI decision, not just a column rename.
